build_system.build_command: mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake -C ../cmake/presets/most.cmake -C ../cmake/presets/nolib.cmake -D PKG_GPU=off ../cmake && cmake --build . -j4

configuration_parameters.description: Execution directory for the benchmark run; must contain the input script and the relative-path data file used by read_data.
configuration_parameters.name: working_directory

configuration_parameters.description: LAMMPS input script passed with -in.
configuration_parameters.name: input_script

configuration_parameters.description: LAMMPS data file loaded by read_data from the working directory.
configuration_parameters.name: data_file

configuration_parameters.description: MPI rank count used by the launcher; this is a major part of the workload definition.
configuration_parameters.name: mpi_ranks

configuration_parameters.description: OpenMP thread count per MPI rank; campaign guidance fixes this at 1.
configuration_parameters.name: omp_num_threads

configuration_parameters.description: LAMMPS unit style from the staged benchmark inputs.
configuration_parameters.name: units

configuration_parameters.description: TIP4P long-range pair style and TIP4P geometry/type arguments.
configuration_parameters.name: pair_style

configuration_parameters.description: Pair coefficients; only O-O LJ is nonzero in the staged inputs.
configuration_parameters.name: pair_coeff

configuration_parameters.description: Bond and angle styles that define the equilibrium geometry used to derive the TIP4P alpha factor in both pair and PPPM code.
configuration_parameters.name: bond_angle_styles

configuration_parameters.description: Long-range solver style and requested relative force accuracy.
configuration_parameters.name: kspace_style

configuration_parameters.description: PPPM differentiation path. The staged inputs do not set kspace_modify diff, so the default is IK.
configuration_parameters.name: pppm_diff_mode

configuration_parameters.description: Replication factors applied to the 216-water data file before running dynamics.
configuration_parameters.name: replicate

configuration_parameters.description: Deterministic Maxwell-Boltzmann initialization used in the staged inputs.
configuration_parameters.example: velocity all create 300.0 123451 dist gaussian mom yes rot yes
configuration_parameters.name: velocity_create

configuration_parameters.description: Neighbor skin and style from the staged inputs.
configuration_parameters.name: neighbor

configuration_parameters.description: MD timestep used by the benchmark inputs.
configuration_parameters.name: timestep

configuration_parameters.description: Thermo fields and sampling cadence used for correctness comparison.
configuration_parameters.example: thermo_style custom step atoms temp etotal pe ke press density; thermo 100
configuration_parameters.name: thermo_output

configuration_parameters.description: Time integration fix plus default run_style verlet path.
configuration_parameters.name: integrator

configuration_parameters.description: Number of timesteps executed by the case.
configuration_parameters.name: run_steps

configuration_parameters.description: Required atom-tag convention for implicit TIP4P reconstruction; O tag n must be followed by H tags n+1 and n+2.
configuration_parameters.example: O atom tag n, H atom tags n+1 and n+2
configuration_parameters.name: tip4p_id_layout

configuration_parameters.description: Newton communication setting required by the TIP4P pair and PPPM kernels.
configuration_parameters.name: newton

configuration_parameters.description: Timing mode needed by the benchmark runner to collect full timing-table output.
configuration_parameters.name: timer_mode

entry_points.description: MPI executable entry point; constructs a LAMMPS instance and calls Input::file() to process the input script.
entry_points.name: lmp

entry_points.description: LAMMPS input command that initializes the system, selects the active integrator, and executes the timestep loop.
entry_points.name: run

entry_points.description: Default MD timestep loop for this workflow; performs communication, neighbor rebuild decisions, pair force evaluation, bonded force evaluation, PPPM evaluation, reverse communication, and output.
entry_points.name: Verlet::run

entry_points.description: Real-space TIP4P long-range pair kernel; computes LJ on real O/H coordinates, computes Coulomb on implicit M-sites, caches O-H neighbors/M-site positions per step, and redistributes M-site force back to O/H atoms.
entry_points.name: PairLJCutTIP4PLong::compute

entry_points.description: Top-level PPPM long-range solver entry point; for these inputs it dispatches to TIP4P overrides for particle mapping, rho accumulation, Poisson solve, and IK electric-field interpolation.
entry_points.name: PPPM::compute

entry_points.description: Maps each local charge to a PPPM grid anchor; for oxygen atoms it reconstructs the TIP4P M-site first.
entry_points.name: PPPMTIP4P::particle_map

entry_points.description: Accumulates charge density on the local PPPM brick using the TIP4P M-site for oxygen charges.
entry_points.name: PPPMTIP4P::make_rho

entry_points.description: Interpolates electric field from the PPPM grid in the default IK differentiation mode and redistributes M-site force back to O/H atoms.
entry_points.name: PPPMTIP4P::fieldforce_ik

output_quantities.description: Thermo-sampled total energy values at matched output steps; used directly and for long-run NVE drift checks.
Derived NVE drift metric over the longer run, normalized by atom count and timestep count.
Thermo-sampled potential energy values at matched output steps.
Thermo-sampled kinetic energy values at matched output steps.
Thermo-sampled temperature values at matched output steps.
Thermo-sampled pressure values at matched output steps.
Thermo-sampled density values at matched output steps.
Representative per-atom force components after pair plus kspace evaluation, compared with RMS and max-absolute deltas.
Final atom count and stable completion invariant; should remain unchanged with no lost atoms or NaN/Inf termination.

suggested_cases.description: Primary short-run training case on 16 MPI ranks; default IK PPPM path, periodic orthogonal bulk water, 41,472 atoms after replicate.
Second short-run training case at a different domain decomposition to keep the optimization robust across MPI layouts.
Longer NVE drift and timer-stability training case on 16 MPI ranks.
Held-out long validation case on a second moderate MPI decomposition.
Held-out scaling-sensitive short case where communication becomes more visible but should not dominate optimization direction.

threading_model.description: Primary parallelism is MPI domain decomposition driven by the launcher; PPPM adds distributed grid communication and FFT/remap communication across MPI ranks. The build presets enable the OPENMP package, but the staged inputs use base host styles `lj/cut/tip4p/long` and `pppm/tip4p` rather than `/omp` suffixed styles, and the campaign guidance fixes `OMP_NUM_THREADS=1`, so the intended benchmark path is effectively pure MPI through the editable source files.
